data.body: CHECKPOINTED — not started. The last large structural refactor from the 2026-07-02 audit: group the reconciler (48 flat files) + llm/ into subpackages, and thread a TicketQuery dataclass through the 5-layer list_tickets replication. Deferred for a post-release maintenance pass per the agreed sequencing (correctness/governance first; wide dir-reorg import-churn is highest-risk to rush pre-release).
